title: galium ruwenzoriense
intro: Galium ruwenzoriense, also known as Ruwenzori bedstraw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of East Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Galium ruwenzoriense include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
